testcase.name: test_offence_categories

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected list of categories assert False + where False = isinstance({'categories': [{'description': 'Murder, manslaughter, and related offences', 'id': 'homicide', 'name': 'Homicide', 'offences': ['Murder', 'Manslaughter', 'Attempted Murder', 'Dangerous Driving Causing Death', 'Infanticide', 'Aiding Suicide']}, {'description': 'Assault, grievous bodily harm, and violent offences', 'id': 'assault', 'name': 'Assault & Violence', 'offences': ['Common Assault', 'Assault Occasioning ABH', 'Assault Occasioning GBH', 'Wounding', 'Affray', 'Intimidation', ...]}, {'description': 'Sexual assault and related offences', 'id': 'sexual_offences', 'name': 'Sexual Offences', 'offences': ['Sexual Assault', 'Aggravated Sexual Assault', 'Sexual Touching', 'Indecent Assault', 'Child Sexual Offences', 'Rape', ...]}, {'description': 'Robbery, theft, stealing, and property offences', 'id': 'robbery_theft', 'name': 'Robbery & Theft', 'offences': ['Armed Robbery', 'Robbery', 'Theft', 'Stealing', 'Receiving Stolen Property', 'Break and Enter', ...]}, {'description': 'Drug possession, supply, and trafficking', 'id': 'drug_offences', 'name': 'Drug Offences', 'offences': ['Drug Possession', 'Drug Supply', 'Drug Trafficking', 'Drug Importation', 'Drug Manufacturing', 'Cultivating Cannabis', ...]}, {'description': 'Fraud, forgery, and dishonesty offences', 'id': 'fraud_dishonesty', 'name': 'Fraud & Dishonesty', 'offences': ['Fraud', 'Forgery', 'Identity Theft', 'Money Laundering', 'Obtaining by Deception', 'Dishonestly Obtaining Financial Advantage', ...]}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_reports_iteration33.py:27: in test_offence_categories assert isinstance(data, list), "Expected list of categories" E AssertionError: Expected list of categories E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'categories': [{'description': 'Murder, manslaughter, and related offences', 'id': 'homicide', 'name': 'Homicide', 'offences': ['Murder', 'Manslaughter', 'Attempted Murder', 'Dangerous Driving Causing Death', 'Infanticide', 'Aiding Suicide']}, {'description': 'Assault, grievous bodily harm, and violent offences', 'id': 'assault', 'name': 'Assault & Violence', 'offences': ['Common Assault', 'Assault Occasioning ABH', 'Assault Occasioning GBH', 'Wounding', 'Affray', 'Intimidation', ...]}, {'description': 'Sexual assault and related offences', 'id': 'sexual_offences', 'name': 'Sexual Offences', 'offences': ['Sexual Assault', 'Aggravated Sexual Assault', 'Sexual Touching', 'Indecent Assault', 'Child Sexual Offences', 'Rape', ...]}, {'description': 'Robbery, theft, stealing, and property offences', 'id': 'robbery_theft', 'name': 'Robbery & Theft', 'offences': ['Armed Robbery', 'Robbery', 'Theft', 'Stealing', 'Receiving Stolen Property', 'Break and Enter', ...]}, {'description': 'Drug possession, supply, and trafficking', 'id': 'drug_offences', 'name': 'Drug Offences', 'offences': ['Drug Possession', 'Drug Supply', 'Drug Trafficking', 'Drug Importation', 'Drug Manufacturing', 'Cultivating Cannabis', ...]}, {'description': 'Fraud, forgery, and dishonesty offences', 'id': 'fraud_dishonesty', 'name': 'Fraud & Dishonesty', 'offences': ['Fraud', 'Forgery', 'Identity Theft', 'Money Laundering', 'Obtaining by Deception', 'Dishonestly Obtaining Financial Advantage', ...]}, ...]}, list)

testcase.name: test_states_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected list of states assert False + where False = isinstance({'states': [{'abbreviation': 'NSW', 'id': 'nsw', 'name': 'New South Wales'}, {'abbreviation': 'VIC', 'id': 'vic', 'name': 'Victoria'}, {'abbreviation': 'QLD', 'id': 'qld', 'name': 'Queensland'}, {'abbreviation': 'SA', 'id': 'sa', 'name': 'South Australia'}, {'abbreviation': 'WA', 'id': 'wa', 'name': 'Western Australia'}, {'abbreviation': 'TAS', 'id': 'tas', 'name': 'Tasmania'}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_reports_iteration33.py:36: in test_states_endpoint assert isinstance(data, list), "Expected list of states" E AssertionError: Expected list of states E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'states': [{'abbreviation': 'NSW', 'id': 'nsw', 'name': 'New South Wales'}, {'abbreviation': 'VIC', 'id': 'vic', 'name': 'Victoria'}, {'abbreviation': 'QLD', 'id': 'qld', 'name': 'Queensland'}, {'abbreviation': 'SA', 'id': 'sa', 'name': 'South Australia'}, {'abbreviation': 'WA', 'id': 'wa', 'name': 'Western Australia'}, {'abbreviation': 'TAS', 'id': 'tas', 'name': 'Tasmania'}, ...]}, list)
